summary: Standard mutual confidentiality agreement to evaluate a potential KRAS medicinal-chemistry collaboration. Terms are broadly within house standards; two minor items to align before signature.

issues.title: No residuals clause
issues.issue: The agreement lacks a residuals clause; personnel retained-knowledge is not carved out.
issues.recommendation: Add the standard residuals clause to protect independent development.

issues.title: Confidentiality survival period
issues.recommendation: Acceptable for early evaluation; negotiate to 3 years if convenient.
